title: [MTR4] Seoul Metro Signage
description: This resource pack adds Seoul Metro signage to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This resource pack adds Seoul Metro signage tiles to Minecraft Transit Railway.

## Included icons
- Line 1
- Line 2
- Line 3
- Line 4
- Line 5
- Line 6
- Line 7
- Line 8
- Line 9
- AREX local
- AREX express
- Gyeongui-Jungang line
- Gyeongchun line
- Suin-Bundang line
- Shin-Bundang line
- Gyeonggang line
- Seohae line
- Incheon line 1
- Incheon line 2
- EverLine
- U Line
- Ui-Sinseul LRT
- Gimpo Goldline
- Sillim line
- GTX-A
- Seoul Metro logo (icon, text, and flipped text)
- Metro icon (icon, text, and flipped text)
